name: Pasta with Vegetables and Lemon
recipeIngredient: 9 oz Fresh angel hair pasta (cooked according to package directions)
recipeInstructions:
Preparation time: 15 minutes. Cooking time: 15 minutes.
1. In a large, non-stick skillet, sauté carrot and onion in olive oil until the onion has softened, about two minutes.
2. Add broccoli, zucchini, and one-half cup of the chicken broth. Cover and simmer for three minutes.
3. Combine the remaining half cup of chicken broth with cornstarch and lemon juice. Stir this mixture into the vegetables along with ginger, lemon grass (if using), and hot pepper flakes (if desired). Cook until the sauce has thickened slightly and the vegetables are crisp-tender, about three minutes. Serve immediately over the pasta.
